query:
-- Add missing columns to stakeholders table
ALTER TABLE stakeholders
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS workingHoursPerDay DECIMAL(4,1) DEFAULT 8.0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS workingDaysPerWeek INT DEFAULT 5,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS externalPartyId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS positionedOnMap BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS includeInEngagementPlan BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS informationNeeded TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS escalationProcedure TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS workingSchedule VARCHAR(100) NULL;

-- Add missing columns to userStories table
ALTER TABLE userStories
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS storyId VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS effortDays DECIMAL(5,1) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scopeItemId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sprintId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS assignedToId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS assignedTo VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS processStep VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS businessRole VARCHAR(255) NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 34DzJoQKEqyc4cp.root --database MtjPfUT7z9e3zhUb3tuetB --execute -- Add missing columns to stakeholders table

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS workingHoursPerDay DECIMAL(4,1) DEFAULT 8.0,

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS positionedOnMap BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS informationNeeded TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS escalationProcedure TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS workingSchedule VARCHAR(100) NULL;

-- Add missing columns to userStories table
ALTER TABLE userStories
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS storyId VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS effortDays DECIMAL(5,1) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scopeItemId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sprintId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS assignedToId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS assignedTo VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS processStep VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS businessRole VARCHAR(255) NULL;
